title: BEM-855 extract reapproval
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:31 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b853=load('governance/state/bem853_verify_reapproval_response.json')
responses=b853.get('responses',[])
text='\n'.join([r.get('text','') for r in responses])
if not text:
    # fallback scan relevant files
    d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file() and ('851' in p.name or 'reapproval' in p.name.lower()):
                text += read(p)+'\n'
lines=[x.strip() for x in text.splitlines() if x.strip()]
changes=[]
for line in lines:
    low=line.lower()
    if any(k in low for k in ['change_required','blocked','required','must','missing','should','need','треб', 'нужно', 'долж']):
        changes.append(line[:600])
status='changes_extracted' if changes else 'changes_not_found'
next_action='patch protocol using extracted changes' if changes else 'inspect full response text and improve extraction'
state={'bem':'BEM-855','status':status,'decision':b853.get('decision'),'changes':changes[:60],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem855_extract_reapproval_changes.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem855_extract_reapproval_changes.md').write_text('# BEM-855 | Extract Reapproval Changes | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem855_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-855'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem855_extract_reapproval_changes.json','governance/reports/bem855_extract_reapproval_changes.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem855_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Extracted concrete reapproval changes/blockers from the latest Claude response state for protocol patching')
"""
No issue comments.
